items.name: Valkenheimer
items.description:
Forged by the master artisan himself, this legendary sword boasts a mesmerizing fusion of vibrant green and violet hues that grace its formidable blade. Meticulously crafted, the weapon effortlessly slices through resilient armored foes. The hilt, an artistic marvel, features the black claws of an otherworldly creature enveloping an emblem exuding both power and modesty. A symbol of triumph against countless adversaries, this extraordinary sword represents the pinnacle of some of the greatest talent in our era...

Created by VOEW; This sword uses PBR materials and dynamically changes based on the lighting of the experience your in!

items.name: Golden Tengu, Japanese traditional mask
items.description:
✨ ✨ LIMITED EDITION ✨ ✨ 
🔴 Other variations:

White Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/124507370440659

Black Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/76162011454800/

Red Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/83744288875009

The red Tengu mask with its long, bulbous nose and stern expression is one of the most distinctive of all traditional Japanese masks. 
This wooden, reddish-brown mask is deeply connected to Japanese folklore, representing the mythical Tengu, a bird-like creature. 
These beings, known as 「天狗  •（てんぐ  •  Tengu）」, are often associated with their mystical abilities and are seen as protectors of the mountains and forests. 

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale

items.name: The Void's All-Seeing Pink Eye
items.description:
"The void calls to all..."
An eye capable of seeing beyond one's realm into the vast multiverse. This eye radiates a dark energy unlike any other. Originally belonging to a creature of the abyss, you too can have the capability to see beyond this mortal plane! The ones who can see best are the ones who look into everything deeply: even the darkness.
Who needs eyes in the back of their head, when you can simply have one massive, levitating eye floating upon your head looking in all directions instead? Now with an ominous, pink glow!

[ You can find all color variants here!: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=All-Seeing&Category=1&CreatorName=Draconic+Artisans&salesTypeFilter=1]
[ This item is a remaster of an older item created by me: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15351096705/The-Voids-Eye-Classic ]
